description: Audit the current repository, detect framework, database, routes, views, static assets, package scripts, deployment assumptions, and risks. Produce a factual audit report only; do not refactor yet.
Create/confirm target architecture for a single deployable Node.js monolith with Express API and React/Vite/MUI client built into public/. Define server/client/storage structure.
Create the organized folders: server/src modules, client scaffold if missing, storage folders, scripts, docs. Do not delete legacy UI yet.
Add .env.example, config loader, NODE_ENV/PORT/session/database paths, secure defaults, health endpoint, and storage safety rules.
Since the project is allowed to start from scratch, design and create fresh SQLite schema/migrations for all core modules without preserving old records.
Implement migration runner, reset/dev seed command, initial admin seed, outlet type seed examples, and safe database initialization.
Implement users, roles, permissions, role_permissions, user_role assignments, password hashing, account status, and session/auth tables where needed.
Build advanced permission middleware: role permissions, optional user overrides, page/menu permissions, action-level API guards, super_admin bypass, and consistent 403 responses.
Add audit log model/service/middleware for login, create, update, delete, disable, payment, inventory, invoice, export, and permission actions.
Create auth APIs: login, logout, me, change password, reset password by admin, session validation, account disable handling, and secure cookie/session config.
Create user management APIs for creating, editing, disabling, enabling, archiving/deleting users, assigning roles, and listing permissions.
Create admin-managed outlet types module. Admin can add/edit/disable outlet types dynamically; these types drive product prices.
Create outlets module with outlet type, governorate, detailed address, phone, credit limit, status, notes, and filters.
Create authors module and optional author accounts: author profile, linked user account, status, and author-book relationships.
Create normalized books/products module with title, code/SKU, author links, category, status, stock policy, and metadata.
Implement product_prices so one book has a separate active price per outlet type. Invoice creation must resolve price from selected outlet type and save snapshots.
Implement inventory ledger schema: receipts, receipt items, inventory transactions, stock summaries, stock adjustments, and opening balances.
Implement receiving books as inventory receipts that automatically increase stock and create ledger transactions.
Create invoice v2 schema: invoice header, items, snapshots, totals, statuses, history, notes, created_by, and immutable financial snapshots.
Implement invoice create/update logic: selected outlet -> outlet type -> price per book, validate stock, calculate totals, decrement stock via ledger.
Implement payments: cash, deferred, installments, mixed; invoice_payments; installment schedule; paid/remaining auto-calculation.
Build calculation engine for paid_amount, remaining_amount, payment_status, overdue installments, reversal/correction rules, and audit entries.
Add shipments and shipment_items. Allow partial shipment operationally while keeping payment/fees on invoice level unless explicitly configured later.
Implement advanced filters for invoices/products/outlets/authors: by book, author, outlet, outlet type, governorate, date, payment status, shipping status, remaining amount.
Create reports APIs: sales, paid, remaining, deferred, balances by outlet/governorate/outlet type, stock reports, author reports, receipt reports.
Implement Excel export for products, prices, authors, outlets, invoices, payments, inventory, reports, outstanding balances.
Implement Excel templates/import pipeline with preview, validation, accepted/rejected rows, and error sheet generation.
Standardize PDF generation for invoices/reports, remove unused PDF dependencies if safe, and ensure RTL Arabic rendering works.
Create React + Vite + Material UI frontend, RTL theme, routing, API client, auth context, error boundaries, and build output to public/.
Build professional dashboard layout: responsive sidebar, topbar, breadcrumbs, role-aware menus, mobile drawer, loading states, and empty states.
Build login, profile, users, roles, permissions matrix, account enable/disable, password reset, and audit view UI.
Build UI for authors, books/products, product details, price per outlet type, DataGrid, filters, and forms.
Build UI for outlet types and outlets with governorate/address/phone/status/credit limit filters.
Build invoices UI: list, advanced filters, create invoice flow, item selection, automatic outlet-type prices, totals, details page.
Build payments UI inside invoice and standalone: add payment, create installment plan, view remaining, overdue, and payment history.
Build inventory receipts, stock ledger, adjustments, stock alerts, shipments, partial shipment status, and shipment items UI.
Build dashboard/reports/excel/pdf export UI with cards, charts, filters, and permission-aware actions.
After new MUI screens are verified, deprecate old HTML/SweetAlert-heavy pages, keep fallback only if necessary, and clean routes/assets.
Add automated tests for auth/RBAC/pricing/invoices/payments/inventory/reports plus lint/build checks and API smoke tests.
Finalize DirectAdmin single Node app deployment docs, build scripts, smoke test checklist, final verification report, and handoff notes.
Hard reset SQLite for fresh production start. Seed permissions and a single super_admin account only; no demo data, no staff, no outlet types, no books, no outlets, no invoices.
Refactor backend from server/src/* to simpler server/* paths. Update app.js, scripts, package scripts, tests, imports, and docs. Keep one Node.js monolith deployment.

Remove old warehouse/bookstore identity, legacy colors, and inconsistent branding from the React UI. Move app name/brand to configurable settings and create a clean neutral professional visual baseline.
Build a premium Material UI theme system with light/dark mode, RTL tokens, typography, spacing, elevations, form/table/card standards, and persistent mode toggle.
Replace the current weak dashboard with a professional executive dashboard: KPIs, quick actions, charts/insights, recent activity, alerts, and responsive layout.
Rebuild sidebar/topbar navigation into clear grouped sections for operations/catalog/finance/inventory/reports/admin with role-aware visibility and mobile usability.
Reduce dialog-heavy flows. Convert major create/edit/detail flows to pages or drawers. Standardize DataGrid filters, empty states, loading states, validations, confirmations, and snackbars.
Run full fresh-start verification: db reset, super-admin login, CRUD smoke paths, light/dark toggle, build, tests, lint, API health, and DirectAdmin deploy readiness.
Finalize simple deployment docs after the new structure and UI reset: one Node app, React build into public, storage safety, env, npm commands, restart, and handoff notes.
Fix the post-login refresh bug, normalize auth/user permission hydration, and correct RTL sidebar/topbar/content layout positioning.
Replace the current weak shell with a premium Material Design style app shell: right sidebar, topbar, content grid, responsive drawer, grouped navigation, active states, and polished spacing.
Standardize all money as Egyptian Pound and all displayed dates/times as Egypt time, with shared server/client formatting utilities and tests.
Rebuild the legacy balance concept as an advanced finance ledger connected to invoices, payments, credit limits, and manual adjustments in EGP.
Add professional finance balance cards, history tables, manual adjustment UI, and dashboard financial overview using the new balance engine.
Restore and upgrade legacy stock/store-limit notifications into a unified advanced notification engine for stock, credit limits, invoices, payments, shipments, and system events.
Add a polished notification center, topbar badge, dashboard alerts, unread/read/resolved workflow, filters, and action links.
Compare the old repo behavior with the modern app, document all remaining functional gaps, and open/implement only critical parity fixes needed for a complete professional system.
Rebuild the dashboard as a high-value operations + finance command center with KPIs, alerts, cash/receivables, stock risk, latest invoices, payments, and quick actions.
Verify and fix connected flows across outlet types, outlets, products, prices, inventory receipts, invoices, payments, balances, shipments, notifications, and reports.
Run final quality gate for UI polish, light/dark mode, responsive layout, EGP/Egypt time, finance, notifications, tests, build, and simple DirectAdmin deployment.
Convert `agent_pack/docs/design.md` into the active design contract for the repo and prepare the frontend structure needed to apply it.
Create a concrete line-by-line frontend style debt inventory before refactoring pages.
Remove inline CSS and move styles into structured CSS files.
Fix the login/session/sidebar issue and rebuild the RTL layout distribution.
Create a polished Google Material-inspired app shell with Light/Dark mode.
Move UI labels to one Arabic JSON dictionary.
Fix all form fields, labels, drawers, and cramped layouts.
Standardize side drawers and confirmation dialogs.
Rebuild Dashboard as a professional operations + finance command center.
Complete author account logic.
Add outlet accounts.
Make balance/finance system complete, auditable, and tied to invoices/payments.
Verify and complete cash/deferred/installments/shipping logic.
Make inventory, receipts, invoice stock deduction, and adjustments fully reliable.
Bring back old notification value and expand it professionally.
Verify product pricing by outlet type and invoice snapshots end-to-end.
Ensure the new platform covers the old system and adds the requested upgrades.
Add automated style/design checks to prevent regressions.
Create a practical visual QA checklist and fix high-priority visual defects found.
Run the final gate after the new design and logic steps.

title: Agent Pack Unified Cleanup + Obsolete Purge
Latest Repo Deep Style + Logic Audit
RTL Fields Labels Alignment Global Fix
Unified Side Drawers/Dialogs for All Entities
Invoice List Actions: Pay, Supply, Ship, Return
Finance Model Final No-Installments With Supply
Partial Shipping by Invoice Items Final Logic
Outlet Balance + Limit Engine With Returns
Backend Dead Code Filter + Tests Cleanup
Frontend Page CSS + Component Split Cleanup
Visual Material Regression Full App Pass
